'''Kessendra''' was a small military town located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]].<ref name="Core Rulebook" /> The world's largest [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] encampment, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] established an administrative center in Kessendra, making it Kessel's impromptu [[Capital/Legends|capital]].<ref name="The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide">''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]''</ref> [[Kessendra Stadium]] was located on the [[City/Legends|city's]] very edge. Several streets in Kessendra included [[Spice Mines Avenue]] and [[Slave Lord Boulevard|Slavelord Boulevard]].<ref name="The Glove of Darth Vader" />

In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], the [[Central Committee of Grand Moffs]] and [[Supreme Slavelord]] [[Trioculus]] used Kessendra as a staging ground for their attempted takeover of the Empire.<ref name="The Glove of Darth Vader" />

By [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], Kessendra was mostly abandoned, and the few residents remaining were evacuated by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
